_comment: This is an example of the reorganized locale structure for Onetime Secret
_comment_2: This shows how current keys map to the new user-type-based organization

secret.title: You have a message
secret.description: Onetime Secret is a secure way to share sensitive information
secret.warning_view_once: Careful: we will only show it once.
secret.view_once_warning: Once you leave or refresh this page, this secret will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered by anyone.
secret.only_see_once: Secrets are designed to be viewed only once
secret.safely_close_tab: You can safely close this tab
secret.when_ready_click: When ready, click the View Secret button at the top

burn.title: Burn this secret
burn.description: Burning a secret will delete it before it has been viewed
burn.confirmation_message: Are you sure you want to burn this secret? This action cannot be undone.
burn.confirm_hint: Burning a secret is permanent and cannot be undone

errors.not_found: That information is no longer available
errors.already_viewed: Information shared through this service can only be viewed once
errors.permanently_deleted: This secret has been permanently deleted
errors.answer_unavailable: Yes, after viewing, the secret is permanently deleted

help.title: Need help?
help.contact_sender: Contact the person who sent you this link

what_am_i_looking_at.title: What am I looking at?
what_am_i_looking_at.description: You're viewing a secure message that was shared with you through Onetime Secret. This content is displayed only once and then permanently deleted from our servers.

can_view_again.title: Can I view this secret again later?
can_view_again.description: No. For security reasons, this secret is only viewable once. After closing this page, the content will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered by anyone, including us.

how_to_copy.title: How do I save this information?
how_to_copy.description: Use the 'Copy to Clipboard' button to copy the entire secret. For longer secrets, make sure to verify you've copied the complete content before leaving this page.

is_viewing_tracked.title: Is my viewing of this secret tracked?
is_viewing_tracked.description: The sender will be notified that their secret was viewed, but we don't track who viewed it or from what location. Your privacy is protected.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_secrets_yet: You haven't created any secrets yet
dashboard.get_started: Get started by creating your first secret

metadata.title: Your Secret Details
metadata.only_view_once: You can only view this secret value once
metadata.each_secret_once: Each secret can only be viewed once. After viewing, it's permanently deleted.
metadata.never_stored: Secrets are never stored in their original form. This approach ensures maximum security.
metadata.for_security_reasons: For security reasons, we can't recover lost secret links or their contents.
metadata.your_secret_available: Your secret will remain available for {duration}

faq.why_only_once: Why can I only see the secret value once?
faq.burn_happens: What happens when I burn a secret?
faq.burn_description: The burn feature lets you permanently delete a secret before it's viewed.
faq.burn_permanently: Burning a secret permanently deletes it before anyone can view it.
faq.display_value: We display the value for you so that you can verify it was created correctly.

help.have_questions: Have more questions? Visit our help center

domains.title: Custom Domains
domains.get_started: Get started by adding a custom domain
domains.confirm_remove: Are you sure you want to remove this domain?
domains.manage_and_configure: Manage and configure your verified custom domains

verification.title: Domain Verification Steps
verification.instructions: Follow these steps to verify domain ownership and activate your custom domain
verification.youll_need: You'll need to complete these steps
verification.before_activate: Before we can activate links for {domain}, you need to verify ownership
verification.add_hostname: Add this hostname to your DNS configuration
verification.cname_not_allowed: A CNAME record is not allowed. Instead, you'll need an A record.
verification.apex_note: Please note that for apex domains (e.g., example.com), you'll need to create an A record instead of a CNAME.
verification.remove_other_records: And remove any other A, AAAA, or CNAME records for this hostname
verification.existing_cname: If you already have a CNAME record for that address, you'll need to remove it first.
verification.propagation_time: DNS changes can take as little as 60 seconds or as long as 48 hours
verification.ssl_certificate: It may take a few minutes for your SSL certificate to be issued after verification
verification.in_order_to_connect: In order to connect your domain, you'll need to have access to your DNS settings

branding.title: Customize your domain branding
branding.use_controls: Use the controls above to customize brand details
branding.click_preview: Click the preview image below to update your logo
branding.preview_description: Preview how recipients will see your secrets
branding.preview_of_page: Preview of the secret link page for recipients
branding.interactive_preview: This is an interactive preview of how recipients will see your custom domain

change_password.title: Change Password
change_password.enter_new: Please enter your new password below. Make sure it's secure!

api_keys.title: API Keys
api_keys.keep_secure: Keep this token secure - it provides full access to your account

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.description: Deleting your account is permanent and non-reversible
delete.confirmation_deactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate your account?
delete.confirmation_delete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account?

common.unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

reset_password.instructions: Enter your email address below and we'll send you a link to reset your password
reset_password.enter_new: Please enter your new password below

secret_form.enter_content_to_share: Enter the secret content to share here
secret_form.sample_sensitive_data: Sample secret content - this could be sensitive data
secret_form.passphrase_hint: A word or phrase that's difficult to guess
secret_form.generate_password_disabled: Generate Password is disabled when the form is valid

instructions.pre_reveal_description: These instructions will be shown to recipients before they view the secret
instructions.post_reveal_description: These instructions will be shown to recipients after they view the secret

validation.secret_empty: You did not provide anything to share

validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address

validation.secret_empty: You did not provide anything to share

homepage.tagline: Secure links that only work once
homepage.description: Keep sensitive information out of your chat logs and email. Share a secret link that is available only one time.
homepage.title: Onetime Secret
homepage.weve_built: We've built this tool to help you share sensitive information securely
homepage.send_sensitive: Send sensitive information that can only be viewed once

cta.title: Elevate your secure sharing with custom domains
cta.subtitle: Strengthen connections and build trust with your own branded secret links

homepage.protip1: Pro tip: You can also create a secret by pasting it on the homepage

password_generation.title: Need a strong password?
password_generation.description: Click the button below to generate a random password

feedback.title: Share your feedback
feedback.subtitle: Help us improve
feedback.description: Hey there! Thanks for stopping by our feedback page. We value your input and use it to make Onetime Secret better.
feedback.placeholder: Share your thoughts, ideas, or experiences...
feedback.text_placeholder: Share your thoughts, ideas, or experiences...
feedback.remember_email: Remember to include your email if you're not logged in and want a response
feedback.thanks: Thanks for helping Onetime Secret improve! It means a lot to us.

404.title: 404 - Page Not Found
404.description: Oops! The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
404.page_doesnt_exist: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved

500.title: Oops! Something went wrong
500.description: We're sorry, but an unexpected error occurred while processing your request.

settings.title: Settings
settings.customize: Customize your app preferences and settings
settings.unsaved_changes: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

jurisdiction.title: Data Region
jurisdiction.description: Data center location for your account
jurisdiction.each_maintains: Each jurisdiction maintains separate legal compliance and data protection standards.
jurisdiction.framework: This regulatory framework is determined by your data center location.
jurisdiction.understand_specific: To understand the specific regulations and protections that apply to your data...
jurisdiction.account_protected: Your account and data are protected under the laws of {jurisdiction}
jurisdiction.serving_from: Serving you from the {jurisdiction} data center

help.title: Help us improve translations
help.description: Your language skills can help expand access to secure sharing globally
help.community_support: Thanks to our community, we support over 20+ languages
help.welcomes_contributors: Onetime Secret welcomes contributors for both existing and new translations
help.start_new: Start a new translation from our English template
help.update_existing: Update a language directly through our GitHub project
help.review_existing: Review existing translations using the language selector above
help.fork_github: Fork on GitHub and submit a PR
help.if_interested: If you're interested in translation, we'd love your help!
help.thanks: Thanks to our community, we support over 20 languages
help.gradually_complete: As we add new features, our translations gradually become more complete
help.contributors: We're grateful to the {count} contributors who've helped with translations
help.people_donated: The following people have donated their time to help translate Onetime Secret
